fa-cloud-drizzle.appearanceId: cloud shape with short dashed or dotted vertical lines falling below it; fluffy cloud outline with a sparse scatter of small drop marks
fa-cloud-drizzle.functionalityId: displays a light rain or drizzle weather forecast; indicates current drizzle conditions in a weather widget
fa-cloud-drizzle.intentId: check light precipitation or drizzle forecast; understand current mild wet weather conditions

fa-cloud-exclamation.appearanceId: cloud silhouette with an exclamation mark overlaid or emerging from its base; puffy cloud outline combined with a vertical bar and dot alert symbol
fa-cloud-exclamation.functionalityId: alerts the user to a cloud service error or warning; triggers a cloud-related notification or critical status message
fa-cloud-exclamation.intentId: respond to a cloud system alert or urgent error; investigate a cloud storage or sync warning

fa-cloud-hail.appearanceId: cloud shape with small circles or solid dots falling beneath it representing hailstones; fluffy cloud outline with a row of round pellet marks below
fa-cloud-hail.functionalityId: displays a hail weather alert or forecast condition; indicates frozen precipitation in a weather status view
fa-cloud-hail.intentId: check for hail risk in an upcoming weather forecast; prepare for frozen precipitation conditions

fa-cloud-hail-mixed.appearanceId: cloud outline with a mixture of round hail circles and angled rain lines falling below; cloud shape combined with both dot pellets and slash marks underneath
fa-cloud-hail-mixed.functionalityId: displays a mixed hail and rain weather warning; indicates a wintry mix precipitation forecast in a weather panel
fa-cloud-hail-mixed.intentId: check for mixed winter precipitation in a forecast; prepare for simultaneous hail and rain conditions

fa-cloud-meatball.appearanceId: cloud silhouette with a round sphere resembling a meatball or spaghetti-ball shape hanging below or within it; puffy cloud outline containing or dropping a circular food-like globe
fa-cloud-meatball.functionalityId: displays a humorous or novelty weather condition indicator; triggers a food-themed or playful cloud animation
fa-cloud-meatball.intentId: engage with a whimsical or entertainment weather feature; access a novelty food-drop or fun weather effect

fa-cloud-minus.appearanceId: cloud silhouette with a horizontal minus or dash symbol overlaid at its center; puffy cloud outline combined with a subtraction bar
fa-cloud-minus.functionalityId: removes or reduces a cloud storage allocation; decrements a cloud item count or capacity setting
fa-cloud-minus.intentId: reduce cloud storage space or quota; delete or subtract a resource from cloud services

fa-cloud-moon.appearanceId: cloud shape partially obscuring a crescent moon to one side; fluffy cloud outline overlapping a curved quarter-moon arc
fa-cloud-moon.functionalityId: displays a partly cloudy nighttime weather condition; toggles a nighttime weather or dark-sky forecast view
fa-cloud-moon.intentId: check overnight or nighttime cloud cover; view evening weather conditions for planning

fa-cloud-moon-rain.appearanceId: cloud outline with a crescent moon visible beside or behind it and rain lines falling below; nighttime cloud shape combined with a curved moon arc and downward streaks
fa-cloud-moon-rain.functionalityId: displays a rainy overnight or nighttime weather forecast; indicates rain during nighttime hours in a weather widget
fa-cloud-moon-rain.intentId: check for nighttime rain in an upcoming forecast; plan for wet overnight weather conditions

fa-cloud-music.appearanceId: cloud silhouette with a musical note or staff symbol overlaid or emerging from it; puffy cloud outline combined with a single eighth-note or double-note mark
fa-cloud-music.functionalityId: opens a cloud-based music streaming or storage service; accesses saved or synced audio files from the cloud
fa-cloud-music.intentId: stream or manage music stored in the cloud; access a cloud music library or playlist

fa-cloud-plus.appearanceId: cloud silhouette with a plus or cross symbol overlaid at its center; puffy cloud outline combined with a vertical and horizontal crosshair bar
fa-cloud-plus.functionalityId: uploads or adds a new item to cloud storage; creates a new cloud resource or increments a cloud allocation
fa-cloud-plus.intentId: add a file or resource to cloud storage; expand cloud capacity or create a new cloud item

fa-cloud-question.appearanceId: cloud silhouette with a question mark symbol overlaid or centered on it; fluffy cloud outline containing a curved query symbol with a dot below
fa-cloud-question.functionalityId: opens cloud service help or troubleshooting documentation; prompts a cloud status inquiry or FAQ lookup
fa-cloud-question.intentId: find help or answers about a cloud service issue; investigate an unknown cloud status or error

fa-cloud-rain.appearanceId: cloud shape with multiple vertical rain lines or streaks falling below it; rounded cloud outline with a row of evenly spaced downward bars
fa-cloud-rain.functionalityId: displays a rainy weather forecast or current rain condition; indicates active precipitation in a weather status panel
fa-cloud-rain.intentId: check for rain in an upcoming forecast; plan activities around current rainy weather

fa-cloud-rainbow.appearanceId: cloud shape at one end of a curved arc of concentric stripes representing a rainbow; fluffy cloud outline with a multi-band arched bow extending from it
fa-cloud-rainbow.functionalityId: displays a post-rain or rainbow weather condition; indicates clearing skies or a colorful weather event in a forecast
fa-cloud-rainbow.intentId: celebrate or share a rainbow weather moment; check post-storm clearing conditions

fa-cloud-showers.appearanceId: cloud shape with a moderate number of angled or vertical rain streaks below it; rounded cloud outline with a spread of shower lines underneath
fa-cloud-showers.functionalityId: displays a shower or intermittent rain forecast condition; indicates scattered precipitation in a weather widget
fa-cloud-showers.intentId: check for passing showers in a weather forecast; plan around intermittent rain conditions

fa-cloud-showers-heavy.appearanceId: cloud shape with dense thick downward streaks or wide lines falling heavily below; cloud outline with a concentrated cluster of bold rain marks
fa-cloud-showers-heavy.functionalityId: displays a heavy rain or downpour weather alert; indicates intense precipitation conditions in a storm forecast
fa-cloud-showers-heavy.intentId: check for heavy rainfall or storm warnings; prepare for severe precipitation or flooding risk

fa-cloud-showers-water.appearanceId: cloud outline with wavy or pooled water lines beneath the falling streaks; cloud shape with rain lines terminating in a ripple or water surface layer
fa-cloud-showers-water.functionalityId: displays a flooding or standing-water rain alert; indicates water accumulation risk in a weather or environment panel
fa-cloud-showers-water.intentId: assess flood or water accumulation risk from heavy rain; monitor precipitation and standing-water conditions

fa-cloud-slash.appearanceId: cloud silhouette overlaid with a diagonal slash line crossing through it; puffy cloud outline bisected by an angled prohibition bar
fa-cloud-slash.functionalityId: disables or disconnects a cloud service or sync; indicates cloud connectivity is off or unavailable
fa-cloud-slash.intentId: turn off cloud syncing or storage access; indicate that cloud services are blocked or disconnected

fa-cloud-sleet.appearanceId: cloud shape with a mix of small dots and angled diagonal lines falling below it; cloud outline with alternating round pellets and slash marks underneath
fa-cloud-sleet.functionalityId: displays a sleet or freezing rain weather forecast; indicates a wintry precipitation mix in a weather status view
fa-cloud-sleet.intentId: check for sleet or icy precipitation conditions; plan for hazardous winter weather travel

fa-cloud-snow.appearanceId: cloud shape with snowflake symbols or asterisk-like star marks falling below it; rounded cloud outline with a scatter of six-pointed crystalline shapes
fa-cloud-snow.functionalityId: displays a snow forecast or current snowfall condition; indicates winter precipitation in a weather panel
fa-cloud-snow.intentId: check for snow accumulation in an upcoming forecast; plan activities around snowy weather conditions

fa-cloud-sun.appearanceId: cloud shape with a partial sun or circular arc with rays peeking out from behind one side; fluffy cloud outline overlapping a sun disc with radiating lines
fa-cloud-sun.functionalityId: displays a partly cloudy daytime weather condition; toggles a fair-weather or mixed-sky forecast view
fa-cloud-sun.intentId: check partly cloudy daytime weather conditions; plan outdoor activities around mixed sun and cloud cover

fa-cloud-sun-rain.appearanceId: cloud outline with a sun partially visible behind it and rain lines falling below; daytime cloud shape combined with a peeking sun disc and downward streaks
fa-cloud-sun-rain.functionalityId: displays a sun-shower or partly cloudy rainy forecast; indicates simultaneous sunshine and rain in a weather widget
fa-cloud-sun-rain.intentId: check for sun-shower conditions in a forecast; plan around mixed sunny and rainy daytime weather

fa-cloud-upload.appearanceId: cloud silhouette with an upward-pointing arrow emerging from or pointing into its base; puffy cloud outline combined with a vertical shaft and arrowhead pointing up
fa-cloud-upload.functionalityId: uploads a file or data to cloud storage; sends local content to a remote cloud server or service
fa-cloud-upload.intentId: back up or transfer a file to the cloud; store or sync content in a remote cloud location

fa-cloud-word.appearanceId: cloud shape containing or overlaid with the letters of a word or a text block; puffy cloud outline with typographic content inside its silhouette
fa-cloud-word.functionalityId: opens a word cloud visualization or tag-cloud view; displays frequency-based text inside a cloud-shaped layout
fa-cloud-word.intentId: view a word cloud of frequent terms or topics; explore text analytics in a cloud-shaped display

fa-cloud-xmark.appearanceId: cloud silhouette with an X mark or cross symbol overlaid at its center; puffy cloud outline combined with two diagonal crossing lines forming an ex
fa-cloud-xmark.functionalityId: removes or deletes a cloud item or service connection; dismisses or closes a cloud notification or error
fa-cloud-xmark.intentId: delete a cloud resource or disconnect a cloud account; dismiss a cloud error or cancel a cloud operation

fa-clouds.appearanceId: two or more overlapping cloud silhouettes of varying sizes layered together; multiple rounded cloud shapes stacked or grouped to suggest an overcast sky
fa-clouds.functionalityId: displays an overcast or heavily cloudy weather condition; represents a cloudy-sky state in a weather or environment panel
fa-clouds.intentId: check for cloudy or overcast weather conditions; view a multi-cloud sky forecast or environment status

fa-clouds-moon.appearanceId: two cloud silhouettes with a crescent moon visible between or beside them; stacked cloud shapes alongside a curved quarter-moon arc in a night scene
fa-clouds-moon.functionalityId: displays an overcast nighttime weather condition; indicates a cloudy night sky in a weather forecast panel
fa-clouds-moon.intentId: check overnight cloud cover or nighttime weather; view an evening overcast forecast for planning

fa-clouds-sun.appearanceId: two cloud silhouettes with a partial sun or disc with rays peeking out from behind or between them; layered cloud shapes overlapping a sun with radiating lines
fa-clouds-sun.functionalityId: displays a mostly cloudy daytime weather condition with some sun; indicates broken cloud cover in a weather status view
fa-clouds-sun.intentId: check mostly cloudy daytime conditions with partial sun; plan around a partly overcast weather forecast

fa-clover.appearanceId: four-lobed symmetric leaf shape with rounded petals arranged in a cross pattern and a short stem; shamrock-like outline with four rounded sections and a vertical stalk
fa-clover.functionalityId: marks a lucky or featured item in a game or promotion; indicates a nature, garden, or St. Patrick's Day themed element
fa-clover.intentId: indicate luck or a seasonal celebration theme; access nature or garden-related content

fa-club.appearanceId: three-lobed trefoil shape with two round upper lobes, one lower lobe, and a short stem; playing card club suit silhouette with a rounded triangular top and stalk
fa-club.functionalityId: selects the clubs suit in a card game action; marks a club-category item in a game or membership context
fa-club.intentId: play a clubs-suited card or access a clubs category; identify or select a club-themed element in a game

fa-cny.appearanceId: Chinese yuan or renminbi currency symbol with a Y shape and two horizontal bars crossing the vertical stroke; yen-like glyph with double strikethrough lines
fa-cny.functionalityId: selects Chinese yuan as a currency option; displays or converts a price into CNY renminbi
fa-cny.intentId: view or set a price in Chinese yuan; access currency conversion or financial settings for CNY

fa-cocktail.appearanceId: wide-mouthed triangular martini glass with a long stem and base, containing liquid and sometimes a garnish on the rim; conical stemware silhouette with a straw or olive accessory
fa-cocktail.functionalityId: opens a cocktail menu or drink ordering interface; filters alcoholic mixed-drink options in a bar or restaurant app
fa-cocktail.intentId: browse or order a cocktail at a bar or event; access a drink menu or mixed-beverage selection

fa-coconut.appearanceId: round or slightly oval coconut shape with a textured husk surface and sometimes a small tuft at the top; spherical tropical fruit silhouette with hatch marks or fiber lines
fa-coconut.functionalityId: marks a tropical or exotic ingredient in a recipe app; indicates a coconut-flavored or tropical menu item
fa-coconut.intentId: find recipes or products featuring coconut; access tropical food or beverage options

fa-code.appearanceId: left-pointing and right-pointing angle brackets with a forward slash between them forming an HTML-like tag symbol; two chevron arrows facing outward with a diagonal bar in the center
fa-code.functionalityId: opens a code editor or source view; toggles the raw markup or programming syntax view of content
fa-code.intentId: view or edit source code or markup; switch to a developer or technical coding interface

fa-code-branch.appearanceId: vertical line splitting into two upward diverging paths with circular nodes at each endpoint; branching fork shape with a trunk and two separate upper arms ending in dots
fa-code-branch.functionalityId: creates or switches to a new code branch in version control; displays branching history in a repository view
fa-code-branch.intentId: branch a codebase to develop a feature in isolation; manage parallel development paths in version control

fa-code-commit.appearanceId: horizontal line passing through a central circle or node flanked by short segments; a dot or ring centered on a straight bar representing a point on a timeline
fa-code-commit.functionalityId: records or views a specific commit snapshot in version control; saves staged changes as a commit in a repository
fa-code-commit.intentId: commit code changes to a repository; review or navigate to a specific point in project history

fa-code-compare.appearanceId: two vertical branch lines side by side with nodes at top and bottom, connected by a horizontal crossbar or arrow; a diff-like parallel track diagram with linking bar between the two paths
fa-code-compare.functionalityId: opens a diff or side-by-side comparison of two code versions; compares two branches or commits in a repository
fa-code-compare.intentId: review differences between two code versions or branches; compare file changes in a code review workflow

fa-code-fork.appearanceId: single vertical line splitting upward into two diverging lines with nodes at each tip; a Y-shaped forking path with circular endpoints at each upper arm
fa-code-fork.functionalityId: forks a repository or creates an independent copy of a codebase; initiates a project fork from a shared source
fa-code-fork.intentId: create a personal fork of an open-source project; branch off an independent version of a codebase

fa-code-merge.appearanceId: two separate vertical lines converging downward into a single path with a curved join and nodes at the start points; a merging track diagram where two branches meet at a common node
fa-code-merge.functionalityId: merges two branches or pull requests into a single codebase; combines separate development lines in version control
fa-code-merge.intentId: integrate a feature branch back into the main codebase; complete a merge operation in a repository

fa-code-pull-request.appearanceId: two vertical branch lines with nodes connected by a curved arc or arrow indicating a merge proposal; a branching diagram with an arched linking path suggesting a pending integration
fa-code-pull-request.functionalityId: opens or creates a pull request for code review; submits a branch for merging review in a repository
fa-code-pull-request.intentId: propose code changes for review and merging; submit a pull request in a collaborative development workflow

fa-code-pull-request-closed.appearanceId: pull request branch diagram with an X mark or closed indicator on the arc or at a node; a branching fork connected by a curved line with a closure or rejection symbol
fa-code-pull-request-closed.functionalityId: displays or filters closed or rejected pull requests; marks a pull request as declined or no longer active
fa-code-pull-request-closed.intentId: review or manage closed or rejected pull requests; track declined code submissions in a repository

fa-code-pull-request-draft.appearanceId: pull request branch diagram with a dashed arc or incomplete connecting line indicating draft status; a branching fork with a dotted or broken curved path suggesting an unfinished merge proposal
fa-code-pull-request-draft.functionalityId: creates or views a draft pull request not yet ready for review; marks a work-in-progress branch submission in version control
fa-code-pull-request-draft.intentId: save a pull request as a draft for later completion; signal that a code submission is still in progress

fa-code-simple.appearanceId: left-pointing and right-pointing angle brackets or chevrons with no inner slash, forming a clean open-tag pair; two outward-facing arrow-like brackets without additional content between them
fa-code-simple.functionalityId: opens a simplified or minimal code or markup view; toggles a lightweight syntax or developer mode display
fa-code-simple.intentId: view or enter a simplified coding or markup interface; access a basic developer view without extra tooling

fa-coffee.appearanceId: wide cylindrical mug or cup shape with a handle on one side and two or three wavy steam lines rising above the rim; ceramic drinking vessel silhouette with curved vapor wisps above
fa-coffee.functionalityId: indicates a coffee break, café, or hot beverage option; opens a coffee shop locator or drink ordering feature
fa-coffee.intentId: find a nearby café or coffee option; take a break or access a hot beverage service

fa-coffee-bean.appearanceId: oval or oblong seed shape with a single central crease or groove running lengthwise; elongated ellipse outline split by a curved line suggesting a roasted bean
fa-coffee-bean.functionalityId: marks a coffee or espresso ingredient or flavor option; indicates a coffee-bean category in a café or grocery app
fa-coffee-bean.intentId: select or explore coffee bean types or roasts; access coffee product details or origin information

fa-coffee-beans.appearanceId: two or three overlapping oval bean shapes each with a central groove, arranged in a small cluster; a group of elongated ellipses with crease lines suggesting a handful of roasted beans
fa-coffee-beans.functionalityId: displays a multi-bean selection or bulk coffee option; indicates a coffee variety or blend category in a product listing
fa-coffee-beans.intentId: browse or purchase a quantity of coffee beans; explore blended or assorted bean options

fa-coffee-pot.appearanceId: tall or round carafe shape with a spout, a handle on one side, and a lid or knob on top; kettle or percolator silhouette with a pouring lip and a domed cover
fa-coffee-pot.functionalityId: opens a coffee maker settings or brewing schedule interface; indicates a coffee pot or brewer device in a smart-home panel
fa-coffee-pot.intentId: schedule or control a coffee brewing appliance; manage a coffee maker or brewer in a connected home app

fa-coffin.appearanceId: elongated hexagonal or tapered rectangular box shape with angled shoulders narrowing toward the head end; a casket silhouette with a wider upper body and narrower base
fa-coffin.functionalityId: marks a funeral, cemetery, or death-themed category; indicates a horror or Halloween-themed element in a game or app
fa-coffin.intentId: access funeral services or memorial-related content; navigate a horror or dark-themed section of an app

fa-coffin-cross.appearanceId: elongated hexagonal coffin silhouette with a cross symbol overlaid on its front face; tapered casket outline containing or topped by a vertical and horizontal bar cross
fa-coffin-cross.functionalityId: marks a religious funeral or burial service option; indicates a Christian or faith-based memorial element
fa-coffin-cross.intentId: access religious funeral or burial-related services; navigate faith-themed memorial or cemetery content
